projectDescription: A data science project that uses linear regression to analyze ecommerce customer behavior and determine whether a clothing store should focus on mobile app or website development.
keyFeatures: Linear regression analysis on ecommerce customer data
Comparative analysis of mobile app vs website engagement
Customer spending prediction model with 98.85% R² accuracy
Feature importance analysis for business decision-making
Data profiling and exploratory data analysis
publicApiSurface: Data Profiling: ProfileReport() for data exploration
Feature Engineering: Avg. Session Length, Time on App, Time on Website, Length of Membership
Evaluation Metrics: Mean Squared Error (MSE) and R-squared (R²)
